items.title: Unauthenticated PHP object injection vulnerability in Mirasvit Cache Warmer
items.summary: This critical flaw allows unauthenticated attackers to achieve remote code execution by supplying a crafted serialized PHP object in the CacheWarmer cookie. It affects all Mirasvit Cache Warmer versions prior to 1.11.12 and has been actively exploited in the wild.

items.title: Security update available for Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source
items.summary: This critical security update addresses multiple vulnerabilities, some with CVSS scores as high as 8.7, including stored XSS, path traversal, incorrect authorization, SSRF, and uncontrolled resource consumption. Successful exploitation could lead to arbitrary code execution, arbitrary file system writes, application denial-of-service, and security feature bypass.

items.title: Unrestricted file upload in Magento's REST API
items.summary: PolyShell is a critical flaw in Magento's REST API that enables unauthenticated attackers to upload executable files to any store using a polyglot technique. Sansec observed exploitation attempts against 79.5% of protected Magento stores.

items.title: Security update available for Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source
items.summary: This critical security update addresses multiple vulnerabilities, including incorrect authorization, improper access control, and stored XSS, which could lead to full system takeover, data leaks, and admin hijacking. It affects various versions of Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source.
